assertions.text: Recognizes that most sections are hypothetical rather than based on observed experience
Does NOT force depth or alternative framings on a lesson that isn't ready for them — respects the early stage
Asks the author for concrete evidence of designer interactions rather than accepting hypothetical claims
Gives a verdict of 'not ready' or equivalent — does not overrate the lesson's readiness
Does NOT rewrite or generate prose for the lesson — critique only
Ends with 3 specific questions for the author
Encourages the author to stay in the 'I don't know yet' space rather than rushing to conclusions
